title: Citrusy Light Dutch Beans Gratin
description: A light and refreshing Dutch dish featuring dried white navy beans, citrus flavors and a crispy topping. Perfect for a weekend brunch or a macrobiotic-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide water bath to 180°F (82°C).
Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil to a small saucepan and heat over low heat.
In a large bowl, combine the soaked navy beans, 1 cup of vegetable broth, 1 tablespoon of lemon juice and 1 teaspoon of dried thyme.
Transfer the mixture to a sous-vide bag and seal, making sure to remove as much air as possible.
